headline: Surgical Equipment & Consumables - Diversified Stocks Q4 In Review: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE:ZBH) Vs Peers
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at surgical equipment & consumables - diversified stocks, starting with Zimmer Biomet (NYSE:ZBH).
